---
title: "Exploratory Plots"
author: Natalie Novoseltseva
format: 
  html:
    theme: cosmo       
    code-fold: true    
    toc: true         
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: true
---
```{r, echo = FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
#libraries
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate)
library(gt)
library(ggplot2)
library(stringr)
library(janitor)
library(reshape2)
library(ggpubr)
library(patchwork)
library(gsw)
```

Data

```{r}
combined <- read_csv("data/joined_dataset.csv")
```

New Plots
```{r}
names(combined)
```

Recalculate the Salinity

```{r}
#convert specific conductance to in-situ conductivity
#combined$Cond_insitu <- combined$SpCond /(1 + 0.0191 * (combined$Temp - 25))

#recalculate salinity (PSS-78)
#combined$Sal_recalc <- gsw_SP_from_C(combined$Cond_insitu, combined$Temp, p = 0)

#remove intermediate column if you don’t need it
#combined$Cond_insitu <- NULL
```

```{r}
combined$Sal_recalc <- 0.00065 * combined$SpCond
```


```{r}
#quality check
summary(combined$Sal)
summary(combined$Sal_recalc)
```

Salinity Plots with recalculated Salinity

Temperature

```{r}
# Original salinity plot
p1 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Temp), !is.na(Sal), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Temp, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Original Salinity",
    x = "Water Temperature (°C)",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Recalculated salinity plot
p2 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Temp), !is.na(Sal_recalc), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Temp, y = Sal_recalc)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Recalculated Salinity ",
    x = "Water Temperature (°C)",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Combine plots side by side
p1 + p2
```

Dissolved Oxygen

```{r}
# Original salinity plot
p1 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(DO_mgl), !is.na(Sal), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = DO_mgl, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Original Salinity",
    x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Recalculated salinity plot
p2 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(DO_mgl), !is.na(Sal_recalc), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = DO_mgl, y = Sal_recalc)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Recalculated Salinity ",
    x = "Dissolved Oxygen",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Combine plots side by side
p1 + p2
```

Turbidity

```{r}
# Original salinity plot
p1 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Turb), !is.na(Sal), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Turb, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Original Salinity",
    x = "Turbidity",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Recalculated salinity plot
p2 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(Turb), !is.na(Sal_recalc), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = Turb, y = Sal_recalc)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Recalculated Salinity ",
    x = "Turbidity",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Combine plots side by side
p1 + p2
```



```{r}
# Original salinity plot
p1 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(ChlFluor), !is.na(Sal), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ChlFluor, y = Sal)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Original Salinity",
    x = "ChlFluor",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Recalculated salinity plot
p2 <- combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(ChlFluor), !is.na(Sal_recalc), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = ChlFluor, y = Sal_recalc)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Recalculated Salinity ",
    x = "ChlFluor",
    y = "Salinity (PSU)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

# Combine plots side by side
p1 + p2
```

How past precipitation influences current and lagged specific conductivity (SpCond)

```{r}
#Total Precipitation (mm) and Specific Conductivity by Season

combined %>%
  filter(!is.na(TotPrcp), !is.na(SpCond), !is.na(season)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = TotPrcp, y = SpCond)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.4, color = "#2C7BB6", size = 1.8) +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1) +
  facet_wrap(~ season) +
  labs(
    title = "Total Precipitation (mm) and Specific Conductivity by Season",
    x = "Total Precipitation (mm)",
    y = "Specific Conductivity"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 16),
    plot.subtitle = element_text(size = 12),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold"),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )
```

```{r}
#filter the data to have equal breaks
combined_1 <- combined %>%
  filter(year>2006)

#create lags
combined_1 <- combined %>%
  arrange(DateTimeStamp) %>%
  mutate(
    prcp_1hr  = lag(TotPrcp, 4),
    prcp_3hr  = lag(TotPrcp, 12),
    prcp_6hr  = lag(TotPrcp, 24),
    prcp_12hr = lag(TotPrcp, 48),
    prcp_24hr = lag(TotPrcp, 96)
  )
```

```{r}
combined_1 <- combined_1 %>%
  mutate(
    prcp_3hr_cum = lag(TotPrcp,1) + lag(TotPrcp,2) + lag(TotPrcp,3) + lag(TotPrcp,4) +
                   lag(TotPrcp,5) + lag(TotPrcp,6) + lag(TotPrcp,7) + lag(TotPrcp,8) +
                   lag(TotPrcp,9) + lag(TotPrcp,10) + lag(TotPrcp,11) + lag(TotPrcp,12),

    prcp_24hr_cum = rowSums(sapply(1:96, function(x) lag(TotPrcp, x)), na.rm = FALSE)
  )
```



```{r}
combined_1 %>%
  select(SpCond, prcp_1hr, prcp_3hr, prcp_6hr, prcp_12hr, prcp_24hr) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = starts_with("prcp_"),
               names_to = "lag",
               values_to = "precip") %>%
  filter(!is.na(SpCond), !is.na(precip)) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = precip, y = SpCond)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.25, color = "#2C7BB6") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "#D7191C", se = TRUE) +
  facet_wrap(~ lag, scales = "free_x") +
  labs(
    title = "Effect of Lagged Precipitation on Specific Conductivity",
    x = "Lagged Precipitation",
    y = "Specific Conductivity (mS/cm)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    strip.text = element_text(face = "bold")
  )
```

Precipitation over the previous 24 hours

```{r}
ggplot(combined_1 %>% filter(!is.na(prcp_24hr_cum)),
       aes(x = prcp_24hr_cum, y = SpCond)) +
  geom_point(alpha = 0.3, color = "#2C7BB6") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", color = "#D7191C", linewidth = 1.2) +
  labs(
    title = "24-hour cumulative precipitation vs. specific conductivity",
    x = "24-hour Cumulative Precipitation",
    y = "Specific Conductivity (mS/cm)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14)
```


```{r}
#create the dataset with daily or even weekly data
```
